content_body:
Spent three nights at this lovely cabin with a very tranquil creek directly behind it. It was so relaxing sitting at the fire pit, watching the fire, and hearing the water trickle over the rocks. It was close to downtown Blue Ridge and even had horse stables just up the road which we enjoyed for an afternoon horseback ride.

If you need an escape into nature, this is the perfect cabin. It was well stocked with essentials and we even enjoyed a night grilling steaks and listening to the water in the creek. Just lovely.
title: Lovely Cabin For Fall Break
